heading: Deduction of principal and interest from annual payment of assessed share of United States of budget
label: 287i Deduction of principal and interest from annual payment of assessed share of United States of budget
text: There shall be deducted from the annual payment of the assessed share of the United States of the budget of the United Nations an amount equal to the corresponding annual installment of principal and interest due to the United States on account of the loan made pursuant to .section 287g of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the United Nations Participation Act of 1945, which comprises this subchapter.act Dec. 20, 1945, ch. 58359 Stat. 619
amendments: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the United Nations Participation Act of 1945, which comprises this subchapter.act Dec. 20, 1945, ch. 58359 Stat. 619
